title: metabasis neapolitana
intro: Metabasis neapolitana is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the family Boraginaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which contribute to its various health benefits. The plant is known to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating conditions such as digestive issues, wounds, and respiratory problems. Metabasis neapolitana can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or cream, and its herbal preparations are often used topically to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
